## Summary
- 

## Feature Inventory Impact
- [ ] Updates `docs/operator/feature-inventory.md` when feature status, risk, routes, env vars, or verification changes.
- [ ] No unsupported product features added.

## Safety / Privacy
- [ ] No client-side secrets introduced.
- [ ] No prompts, message contents, precise locations, tokens, or PII added to logs.
- [ ] Auth, Firestore rules, migrations, billing, deployment, and credentials are unchanged or explicitly approved.

## Verification
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Local smoke check, if UI/API behavior changed

## Known Risks / Follow-Ups
